text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 1 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
As you just lie and wait
In such a sorry state
The metamorphosis
Has turned you into this
As you just lie and wait
In such a sorry state
The metamorphosis
Has turned you into this
Once a man no longer can you
Share what was the world you
Once had
Everyone will be glad when it's
All over
Everyone will be glad when it's
All over
